Shot-to-shot continuity: maintain identical character identity, scene layout, lighting and prop positions as established in previous shot. Visual style must match preceding frame. Do not introduce new visual elements not present in the reference images. Stable visual consistency across entire clip. No character drift, no prop mutation, no scene layout shift.
